text: The sterile orderliness of the hallway both attracts and unnerves me; I am humbled by the glass barrier inviting me to contemplate what lies beyond. As I approach the R+D display, surrounded by text and screens inviting deep consideration of research and progress, I am filled with anticipation and curiosity. The air here is charged with the sense of human striving to understand, connect, and innovate. I feel at once small—yet deeply engaged, eager to lose myself in the philosophical questions posed by the space and its artifacts.
